name: [CYOS] Brant | WuWa
description:
Create your own scenario!

Brant | Wuthering Waves | Rinascita

-`✮´-

• I made this for my own use, because I dislike most of the very few Brant bots on here (none of them are very open, and I love the story being ready for creative freedom), and this fanart by the goat tappeee reminded me I love this man.

• Finally getting into WuWa again after dropping it for a few months (too few men lmfao), but it’s fun again so more WuWa bots expected in the future.

• Put details in the chat memory if you’d like to add some context and backstory!

-`✮´-

Enjoy!! Please leave a review and requests down below, I’m happy to do other ZZZ/Hoyo/WUWA characters too! Eventually.

Icon Art by @tappeee on Twitter/X
creator: Juliuxe
